content:
1. I started playing in the end of Castor's debut banner (i forgot the precise month). A friend talked about turn based games and mentioned this game, i initially planned to try the game and tell them how it goes. Though I already know of morimens, I only installed it after that talk. Then i got addicted to it haha
2. Even though the story prior is cut and imperfect, chapter 9 punched me in the face mercilessly. Self-sacrifice is one of my weaknesses, I cried real tears while finishing the chapter. I also personally love arc 2 chapter 2 for William's (tragic) backstory
3. Anything related to the Keeper, Silver Technology, or about other realms that Doll mentioned in chapter 1!
4. I enjoy the stories behind production that you share, it makes us learn more about the character and the process of creating them. If possible, I would love to hear about my beloved William too!
5. Thank you for your hard work and passion as always! Please take a great care of yourself and good luck.
